notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the emacs SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 5 CVEs: CVE-2022-48337, CVE-2022-48339, CVE-2024-30203, CVE-2024-30205, CVE-2024-39331.
notes.title: Description
